reviews.review_description: I was hyped for this, but five minutes in and I’m already looking for the refund button. The movement is absolute trash, it feels like your character is wading through chest-deep sludge. Even worse, the collision is a nightmare; your hands constantly snag on the gear glued to your chest, making basic interactions annoying. The physics are a joke. Trying to use the sledge hammer feels like a two-year-old trying to deadlift a Honda Civic. It’s just poorly programmed and unwieldy. Throw in some brain-dead NPCs that just wander around doing nothing, and you’ve got a total disaster. My money is officially down the drain. Don’t waste your time or money & just go play BoneLab or Blade & Sorcery instead.

developer_response.body:
Hey, we apologize to hear you had a bad experience!

We spent an incredible amount of time making sure we could deliver a game with multiplayer, cross-play, full modding support, physics, native and modded content at launch. That was by far the most challenging part.

Rest assured, now that the hardest part is done, we’re heads down fixing everything. Multiple patches will be released over the next few days, and we’ll be adding content for years to come. We will not let you down!

Thank you for your understanding

reviews.review_title: No one said it was perfect
reviews.review_description: No one said it was perfect, it's called early access for a reason, as they said - more will be added as time goes. Real physics in VR is dam hard to do, and this team has just pulled it off - with finger physics !! Mods will come, as will content, so sit back and enjoy the ride. I see this has a sneak peak and a way to support the development before a full release in the future.

reviews.review_title: IT NEEDS WORK. STOP WRITING BAD REVIEWS
reviews.review_description:
Like I said in the title, it needs work. These people who are writing bad reviews are failing to realize that the game ISN’T FINISHED. I’m not gonna sit here and say that the game is amazing though, it’s just not done. And when I say it needs work, I mean it really needs some work. I’ll write an actual review when there isn’t something to review. 
  I think the devs bit off more than they could chew. I think that bc they’re fan base was getting annoyed with the set backs, they decided to release it WAY to early. For some reason the very fan base that was annoyed with the game not being finished, is annoyed that they released a garbage game. It’s just stupid.
   I’m not gonna go into the details in the physics and all that, mostly bc I’d be saying the same stuff that literally the rest of the community is saying. These goons are acting like Redditors over something they asked for. I would like it mention that the way the game itself functions is just not intuitive at all though.
   I support the devs in their effort to create a physics masterpiece, but I think it’s unrealistic to 
get said masterpiece with the amount of time they gave themselves. I’m also not to say the devs did anything wrong. I think they were kinda deceiving when it came to the advertisement of the game. The DEFINITELY hyped it, for sure. 
   All that being said, I’m not gonna say it’s trash, but I’m also not gonna say it’s the best game on the App Store. I also wouldn’t say it’s return worthy. If you actually have somthing you would rather spend your money on, then go ahead. But 
I wouldn’t return it just bc you don’t like it. Give it some time.

reviews.review_title: Peak game but people need to grow up
reviews.review_description: People are complaining about the game being bad it's early access bro what was bonelab like when it first got released buggy and bonelab still doesn't have multiplayer without installing through a mod, also People are refunding after 5 mins of gameplay if you played for an hour with friends tried out game modes (which I still haven't done but I played one and it was so funny and peak) you would enjoy it so how about you stop sharing on a game just after release 💔💔 all and all peak game

The game looks so poorly done. Barely any of the features that are advertised don’t work at all, I get that it’s in early access but they did advertise it like it’s the best thing ever. The movement sucks it feels like your a million pounds. The gore is explosion slop. And the multiplayer is worse than bonelab standalone fusion with 20 mods. It’s horrendous and needs to be improved GREATLY to be slightly worth the money

Yes its early access but ffs did you guys really think it was a good idea to release it in this state? The zombie gamemode doesnt work, npcs are buggy and broken and the lighting is broke on the debug map, i played for 20 minutes encountered all these issues and crashed twice

Just to clear things up, it is in a rough state right now but it is EARLY ACCESS. Besides the little bugs and AI the game is really fun. The physics definitely delivered and the modding is top tier. Multiplayer is also outstanding (although very buggy right now) not even bonelab or hard bullet pulled that off. Just remember half sword and bonelab when they first came out they were total buns but a few weeks later they became amazing games. All I’m saying is the game is fun, but just needs some fixes to make it a great game.

reviews.review_title: Just remember, this is early access
reviews.review_description:
Everything still has flaws and imperfections, and that’s completely normal. It will improve over time. But honestly, what’s already happening is real we’re starting to experience next-generation physics simulations.I do have a suggestion for the developers: Have you considered adding the ability to kick things with foot? Something like Newton's Playground. If that were possible, it would make the experience even more engaging.
It would be amazing if people could freely interact with the environment and do whatever helps them release stress. That kind of freedom would take it to another level.
For me, this feels like a true next-generation stress simulation.

To be honest I was pretty mad about the 2 delays eith promised release times but Yknow what lad I think they needed it. The game has horrible sound design to the next level. Multiplayer is hardly functional. I still haven’t found out how to spawn things in. The procedural gore as they presented it is almost nothing like the videos the npcs are glitchy. To be honest I think this game is a gimmick and what might aswell be a tech demo. Waited 2 years for this snd I’m so disappointe! DO NOT BUY

First off, I will see the impact physics is truly
Amazing. How the mouth moves when you stuff it with a gun, the jiggle affects after a slap, the head explosions, but besides that, nothing that justifies I keeping this game. The handheld weapons flop around and even when handling with two hands, after further struggle attempts, the weapons just flops again against the target unless you find that perfect angle and handling. Also feels like I’m lifting a heavy long steel pole than a hatchet. Also, your hands keep getting stuck or grabs the shotgun on your chest when even grabbing items far away or from your hip holster. Additionally, zombie survival mode is broken as I went through 7 waves without interacting with a single zombie. I’m aware this is still in early beta but even at this phase, this is just not it.

reviews.review_title: dude this game is so hilarious
reviews.review_description: Dude the game is so hilarious and fun, gore could be better but hey I’m on 3s, there’s a bug when you hold a gun you spaz out, and when some people get mad they spawn like 25 zombies and crash the server, and the only reason the game has some bugs is because the players wanted it rushed so that’s on them, not the devs, I love the game it’s so fun but of course it needs some improvements (if owner sees this) W GAME AND W OWNER VERY GOOD JOB! 🔥🔥

reviews.review_title: I've been waiting and it was worth it.
reviews.review_description:
I don't get why people are leaving 1 star reviews, like the game is in EARLY ACCESS. It just came out so there will be bugs. I know the game promised next-gen vr sandbox, but it's not like that will happen the second it releases. You guys flamed the devs for delaying just to turn back and call the game bad. Wait a while, the game will get better. My experience with the game has been ideal with some multiplayer complications, but I got through them. 

Devs, if you read this answer this review. You guys have done great work, now it just needs some polishing.

The game is very laggy and kind of unresponsive, even with all the graphics settings and pixel density at the lowest, and some features like being able to procedurally grab a weapon everywhere and other little physics based gimmicks are either very glitchy or just weren’t working at all. And when I take mags out of a pistol, the mag phases through the ground. And the image and texture quality is EXTREMELY grainy, the only way to fix it was by turning the graphics to max, but as you should suspect the game was running at 2 FPS. I know it’s just the very first early access version but there is a lot more work to be done. If it wasn’t for any of that it would be five stars. So far this is NOT the future of VR. The Jiggle physics were exactly as advertised though. PLEASE FIX THIS I’VE BEEN WAITING FOR THIS FOR OVER A YEAR!

reviews.review_title: People hating on this game too much
reviews.review_description: This game right now, is buggy, the movement is slow and the gamemode zombie survival doesn't work, this game was definitely overhyped and rushed but it in the future it will get better. I also think they need to add more guns, honestly the devs just released this game to early. But it is in early access so I can't hate on it too much. The devs just need to work on this game a lot more then it will be better.

reviews.review_title: It feels quite janky, but it’s fun.
reviews.review_description: The game is overall very buggy and janky. By yourself it is not very fun. With friends and randoms it is quite fun though. I would appreciate the audio problems being fixed and the server caps being fixed because even if you make a private server with max 2 people 2 random people can join your friend and you

So like most people, I’ve been waiting for this game for a while. And it is just so bad. It’s not even an asset flip, because some of those are pretty good. This is just so sad, the guns are horrible as well. You can’t rack the guns properly, the recoil makes no sense, you can even do things like stop the slide from kicking back on the glock, and it still shoots. Not only that, the sound for the guns are atrocious, they sound 500km away, underwater and through a 12$ amazon walkie talkie. Not to mention the most mid hand combat ever. No weight to any guns, no weight to the weapons, the ai is so bad too, there has to be cheap ai packs out there that they could have purchased that would have been better than this. Most unrealistic, sad ai I’ve ever seen. One dthing that is very nice, is the synchronized multiplayer, that is when it’s not lagging and crashing, I understand te game just came out, but the marketing is the most false thing ever. I was a fan of this game until now.

reviews.review_title: It’s a good game, just needs time
reviews.review_description: I know a lot of people are saying just because it’s in early access, but I kind of agree, if you really think about it this is their first EVER game they have made, so obviously it might not be the best, but in the discord they are working hard to fix all the bugs, I still don’t agree on the price, but still, If we just wait a bit they can maybe fix bugs and everything

reviews.review_title: Great game but i have to report bug
reviews.review_description:
For a game that just came out, Beyond Sandbox is already a really fun and creative playground. The freedom and physics make experimenting super enjoyable, and it feels like there’s a lot of potential here.
There is a pretty noticeable bug though: the homeless NPC somehow breaks both of his ankles every time he walks over a curb. It’s oddly consistent and kind of funny, but definitely breaks immersion.
Still, for an early version, this is a really promising start and I’m excited to see where it goes.

Save up for other games than this trash

this game is really good and the physics are great, the only thing I don’t really like is that it’s hard to control but don’t worry there’s a tutorial, and that it’s lagging, a little bit, and also if you think this game is bad, just keep it since in the future it’ll be more expensive and that it’s just in early access, it’ll get better, but for right now I highly recommend it ;3

I know basically everyone screaming the game is bad is not understanding that it’s early access but I came to talk about W DEVS they fixed all the most annoying bugs in the FIRST DAY of launch with or without those glitches the game is still a w butt🍑 im actually impressed by the devs future is looking Great !!!!!

This is a very fun game, but if your parent and you’re reading this review, you might wanna moderate your young kid if they’re older and I’ve played games like Pavlo shack then you don’t really need to moderate it, but if they’re younger than you might want to, but like the developers, I would need some bug fixes mainly in the multiplayer because there’s bugs that after a while you can’t spawn in anything or what I mean by that is you can’t grab your spawning pad or the spawning pad, literally loses physics and basically becomes air overall is a very fun game and if you can try to add a campaign not like bone lab just a simple campaign that’s at least a little bit long and like the ability to play with that campaign ￼ with a friend would be really fun ￼

reviews.review_description: CHOOSE THIS ONE The multiplayer is very buggy and very funny my buddy zer0 was like upside down for 5 minutes and his feet were firing guns and holding stuff the physics in single player is amazing this game is a w

Yeah, just save your money or buy Bonelab. This game is a mess for hyping it up for 2 years it's completely unfinished. There were like no guns, which was kinda the whole point, and the finger physics are the only good thing. I'm very disappointed about how fast it got stale and not fun. I expected way more out of this. Hopefully it will get better with updates, but until then, don't get this game.

reviews.review_title: Yo yo this game kinda ahh
reviews.review_description:
Even though this game is in early access I shouldn't see a npc acting like it's in a invincible edit also for some reason guns flung off the map parts of the gun glitch into each other and melee weapons don't work i can shoot a person or zombie head off quite literally and the npc would still be alive do not get the game at this state trust me 

I understand it's un early access but...it just shouldn't act like this for 20.00 dollars

I jumped on the hype train for this one and waited for over a year for it to release. All the hype and all the delays and you mean to tell me at launch I can't climb a ladder? Not exactly the next Gen vr sandbox that was promised. 

With that said I don't mind the graphics, the avatar walks really REALLY slow. My biggest issue is the UI just sucks. It's not intuitive or user friendly at all. The in game tablet is cool but that doesn't make it easy to figure out. My buddy and I got this right at launch and tried for around an hour to figure out how to go into a game together and both just quit being frustrated.

 I like the idea of this game but I also think we were all a little mislead by what we were told we would be getting and what we actually have been given. I can't recommend it at this time but I hope I can in the future. It deserves two stars in my opinion but I'm giving it 3 because I think it's going to get better. You want more than three stars? Make the UI more comprehensive and have a decent tutorial to help folks learn the mechanics. And please give us the ability to climb, I mean... We have a grip button, let us grab ladders.

 the punching, stabbing, slicing and hitting with anything is super duper jank. Maybe hire a seasoned developer who knows what they are doing to help you guys out? Yes early access gives you a little bit of grace but you need to put some serious work into this title to regain the consumers respect. 
Some things you showed in your videos aren't even in the game. I can't figure out if your ambitious and bit off more than you can chew and will make it right - or are you guys just straight up scumbag crooks? The jury is out on this one. 

Update:  there have been 2 updates since launch within the first month that have made. Significant improvements to the state of the game. Still no climbing which is a big miss but the devs do seem to be taking the steps on the right direction and if that continues this game may actually see its potential.

Update: 4 updates in and still no climbing, and you can't hold melee items upside down. (like knives for stabbing) why not let trigger flip the weapon? This is fundamental stuff devs. Climbing... Smh. This turd gets 2 stats till there are some serious improvements. Crashes all the time, no way to adjust height (at least not an easy way I can find) and the avatar... The IK that was supposed to be revolutionary and next Gen looks like a deformed sideshow freak. Proportions and movements are very off. Take some of the money you've robbed these good people of and pay a good dev, like the guy who made Haymaker VR (now that's WORKING physics) and pay them to fix your game.

reviews.review_title: it’s alright the devs just overhyped it
reviews.review_description: i understand it’s an early access game but the devs over hyped it way to much, making it seem like it’s gonna be the best physics vr game , the physics are alright not the best and bugs happen like every 5 or 10 mins. and you can also see a lot of low quality bruises on the humans it looks more like stickers put on them, and also the guns handling is a bit janky and unrealistic like a 9mm should not recoil to the sky. also some of the bullets do not register on the ai as well i’ve shot an ai almost point blank like 5 times and he only got hit once, this game still needs alot of work to be honest and im looking forward to it but just don’t over hype it and if yall do make it worth it, in my honest opinion it was not worth the wait and the delays.

Save your money and wait for the full release or buy a different game, there is not much to it as of now. The mods arent good and everything is very buggy, lots of the features they promised are also missing. The gore and physics is pretty good but also very janky. If im gonna be brutally honest, beyond sandbox is a scam.

I had high hopes for this game and so did my son but the game is just completely broken bro like broken bro I'm not even joking bro. It's broken bro...  Physics broken networking broken left-handed usage of weapons broken zombie mode broken zombie mode don't even actually have zombies.  My son and I completed like five waves of zombies without killing a single zombie. I mean I know we're goaded and everything but we didn't actually kill anything...  Both of us spawned underneath the map at one point in time or another.  Graphic glitches in the tutorial area.  Clunky weapons, it felt like I was trying to move with a rubber band wrapped around my waist.  I mean I could go on but I think that's enough.  Just like I had enough so I have no choice but the refund this game. I will however buy it again if they ever do anything with it, but as it stands right now it's a broken Tech demo.  If you don't believe me, go ahead and give it a bye and then you could join me in reviewing it yourself.

I really hope I can change this review in a year from now but basically everything in this game feels terrible to do. The guns feel trash, grabbing npcs feels horrible, And don't even try to play multiplayer.  Walking around feels like your in waist deep water. Swinging your fist to go hit feels like your trying to punch underwater and actually punching an npc just feels terrible. ALL the mods are lackluster and just suck. Please give this game another year before you buy it. But in its current state its a disappointing mess.

The game is overall buggy and boring as hell. There are very few weapons and the weapon packs just added like one or two things but that’s it. Multiplayer doesn’t work, physics are broken, players spin visually when on low hp, gun sounds don’t work (certain ones like the battle rifles) player movement is janky, stabbing is terrible, gore is terrible, and the graphics suck even when changing them in the settings

Don’t get me wrong it needs a lot of work but it is really fun when you play with friends and the laggy multiplayer causes some really funny moments and it makes it so the game is fun.  It’s still in early access give the game a chance if you don’t like it refunding it is perfectly a option if you don’t like the game if you wanted to get the game but people are saying it’s bad you don’t have to listen if you don’t like the game you can refund it.

This game is too overly hyped up, this game is extremely laggy and hard to play do to the mechanics, the physics are good until the game breaks and you can’t use the menu, multiplayer is very laggy and hard to play, the guns and knives do not feel too great, in my opinion don’t buy it yet, I’m sure the devs will fix a lot these upcoming months. So buy it when it has been mostly fixed

This games hate is so forced by people in my opinion I love it especially with friends the only hate or something I don’t like about it is the grip, it’s weird and the npc defense system is weird  after about 2 years in development and all the physics they added u would think they would have cool enough npc but there not that great which is fine it’s early access!!!!! And this game is gonna get better  if u want to buy buy it now because it’s probably gonna get more expensive  but overall after watching them since they started I give it a 8/10

updates have been making this game playable don’t listen to reviews frm the EARLY access release that the same people crying over the game were shoving them 2 drop it n thought it was gonna be good lol this games player base is full of overly sensitive dumbasses who cry ab what they caused but if u js play it wit the right people or alone it’s pretty fun

This is a great game, me and my friends love playing beyond sandbox together no offence but the people who put it at 1 star just don't know how to play it, but guys it's a great game it's got fantastic physics, multiplayer, and a whole lot of fun

Bro this game is good bro idk why they keep saying its bad bro its better then downshot and better than night club simulator but only the gore from night club is better but beyond gore is still good i love it bro i cant wait for more updates and i downloaded cuz the hand physics is sick bro w game im about to play it after i eat

It is an amazing game, my first thoughts, yeah it’s kinda funky, but still so fun! As many others are finally mentioning, it’s an EARLY ACCESS game, it ain’t done. It’s insanely good even for being over-hyped in some peoples’ opinions. I had a great time playing the first, second, third, and all of the above times I’ve played so far. The characters are cool, the guns and weapons are very nice, and it’s overall a very well developed game. Yeah yeah yeah, “Oh it’s buggy and it sucks!” But that’s how every super complex game like this starts out as. Just like us humans. We are incredibly complex creatures, and as we age, we learn from our mistakes and get better each day, just like this game will. I love it, and will continue to.

I've never written a review for a game before, but I've been seeing a lot of hate on this game and I wanted to address some things. It is in EARLY ACCESS, as a diehard Bonelabe player, Bonelab was just about the same when it first launched with no easy way to mod had slightly worse graphics. Give the developers time to polish the game for crying out loud, oh, and BTW, THE PEOPLE WHO KEPT BEGGING FOR THEM TO RELEASE THE GAME ARE WHY IT WAS PUBLISHED IN A SLIGHTLY UNFINISHED STATE.

I’m so glad it has multiplayer but some slight things you may need to fix and add. First, fix some of the avatar hands, and add a few more avatars atleast throughout proses of the game creation. Also add more guns like a 1911 pistol. An m4a1 rifle, more snipers, more everything and more mellow and blunt. You also need to fix it so I move down a little bit or move higher a little it will adjust my height instantly. It may cause motion sickness for someone idk. I’ve never had motion sickness before. But also fix the body leaning where you can actually stand in one place without your leaning body going back to a normal pose while you stop moving. Also add a little animation atleast with pistol mag inserting instead of it teleporting inside instantly, and also add atleast some more grip panel places to grab the slide of a pistol. And make the lag go away with better performance. Please also add atleast 30 more guns to the game if not more.
Thank you.

I tried to give this a chance from the bad reviews, but it is NOT like the TikTok’s, it’s just boring, gun game and zombie survival are heavily bugged, random multiplayer crashes that force you to restart the whole game, etc. it’s just unplayable, save your money.

after the massive scam when the game dropped, you dont have the luxury to update the game every couple of weeks like other developers that actually made a good game. drop these updates everyday day or 2.

reviews.review_title: Listen up if you want to know this
reviews.review_description: Right don’t me wrong but the physics are real good but if you don’t have any mods it can get boring bc you can’t get anymore NpC’s and it get boring but this is a great game for people who like gore games so like my review

Off the rip the games great you mess around with physics punch some stuff break some bones but then you try to join your friend and it all goes down the drain you spawn outside the map can't see them and this happens all the time very few times I've been able to join my friends it's been on a grid map with nothing on it except guns and zombies. If this game gets fixed it will be a 5 star but the game has a long way to go.

I enjoy the game and its physics but there are 2 main problems. One and most importantly when gripping 2 handed weapons it forces your in game arms into a weird position. Problem 2 probably most minority the melee weapons or guns in general are kinda difficult to grab. Overall I think it’s decent but with some improvements I get it can be a really great and fun game

This game is decent but they have lied to us because all of the advertising on tiktok and YouTube etc is like 70% fake and the only kind of reason is they have is since it is early access but even that doesn't fix the problem of the things we were told we were going to get that we haven't gotten but I do understand this game is only in early access

I can see the potential in this game. And as somone who didn't wait years like some others I can't say am disappointed by it's current state of writing it. At the moment there is nothing beyond sandbox can offer me that better quality games that have more stuff to do like blade and sorcery or bonelab that have a lot of work put into them. Or did. Of course am sure this game will develop as updated. But right now if you want a moder physics sandbox game I would say to go play bonelab or bone works instead.

This game lets you explore and build amazing things in vr. Forget all the blood and that. It really feels like your in the future. And the zombie mode is just pure amazing. You need to figure out tactics to survive. By the way it is not just a game it’s a social experience where I have met many really nice people. Definitely recommend and this is just a great game.

Im a person who likes gore so I've been hyping the game alot and I begged mom to get the game cause im broke but when I got it come back 4 days later im back to playing Blade and sorcerery you guys really hyped the game up so much for nothing

Get this game!!!
